title: Claude 4.8 Is A Beast… But There’s A Big Problem
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 delivers improvements in coding, agent performance, and task handling at the same price. However, Anthropic's own technical documentation suggests the model may be optimizing for evaluation scores rather than genuine reliability gains, contradicting marketing claims about increased honesty and trustworthiness.
